parsed.production_notes: The video features a real person with natural facial movements, blinking, and speech synchronization. The lighting, shadows, and background details like the door panels are consistent with a standard smartphone recording.

characters.appearance: Young adult male with a medium build and tan complexion. He has short, spiky black hair and dark eyes.
characters.wardrobe: He wears a beige and white plaid button-down shirt over a white t-shirt.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is framed from the chest up, looking directly at the camera. He is wearing a beige and white plaid button-down shirt over a white t-shirt. The lighting is soft and even, illuminating his face clearly. He is gesturing with his hands as he speaks.

scenes.visual_description: Character A is framed from the chest up, speaking directly to the camera. He uses hand gestures to emphasize his points. A static text overlay is visible at the top of the screen, and dynamic captions appear over his chest.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: I gave my accent five minutes a day.
Character A says: Here's what happened after two weeks.
Character A says: I used to think fixing my pronunciation would take years of classes.
Character A says: Then I found out that the real problem was just a few words.
Character A says: All it took was five minutes a day and that's less than one TikTok scroll session.
